Generate the referring expression starting with the tag "Expression: " for the given target grid. Omit any other text.

content.thinking:

Target grid:
- Row 1: X X X X X (all filled)
- Row 2: X □ □ □ □ (first filled, rest empty)
- Row 3: X X X X X (all filled)
- Row 4: X □ □ □ □ (first filled, rest empty)
- Row 5: X X X X X (all filled)

- Row 1: X X X X X
- Row 2: X □ X □ X
- Row 3: X X X X X
- Row 4: X □ X □ X
- Row 5: X X X X X

- Row 1: X X X X X
- Row 2: X □ □ □ □
- Row 3: X □ □ □ □
- Row 4: X □ □ □ □
- Row 5: X X X X X

Pattern: Only rows 1 and 5 are fully filled, rows 2, 3, 4 have only the first column filled.

Key differences:
- Target has 3 fully filled rows (1, 3, 5) while Distractor 2 has only 2 fully filled rows (1, 5)
- Target has rows 2 and 4 with pattern X □ □ □ □, while Distractor 1 has rows 2 and 4 with pattern X □ X □ X
- Target has alternating fully filled rows with rows that have only the first column filled


- The target can be described as three horizontal stripes of complete rows interspersed with rows containing only a left-column fill
